title: Implement basic recognition of the "--isolation" option
body: Add the basics of handling the "--isolation" option, though at the moment, the only recognized option is "oci", which is our default.

comments.body: Should the default be runc versus oci?  Is the goal of this to support kata or givisord containers?  Or are you looking at something else?

This was where I was expecting to add a _chroot_ option.  If the kata and gvisord runtimes are compatible with runc at the CLI level, I'd rather not force people to specify this option in addition to `--runtime`.
Of course theoretically we could build a oci-chroot. :^)
